title: hieracium morthieri
intro: Hieracium morthieri, also known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Hieracium morthieri is often made into a tincture, tea, or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
